text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, Hishi Akebono and I are on our
way home when...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hm? I wonder what Nature's up to over there?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good timing, Akebono! And your trainer's
here with you, too? Hey there. Could you both
lend me your ears for a sec?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature hands us a flyer with pictures of
teacups, plates, and earthenware pots on it, as
well as the slogan, "Create art unique to you."

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: This is for... a free trial of a ceramics class?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So, basically, I'm friends with one of the
shopkeepers in the shopping district, and he
asked me to stop by and observe one of his
classes...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Except my schedule's packed right now, and I
can't go. Sooo...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Do you think you two could attend in my place? If
you go now, you'll get to make a ceramic piece
for free!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We'll go, we'll go! You don't have to us ask twice!
Right, Trainer? ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Hishi Akebono has already answered for the
both of us, I agree to attend the event. On the
day of the free ceramics class...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm so excited to make a one-of-a-kind art piece.
Hehe! I'll have to take a picture of it and send it
to my parents when it's done!
choice_data_list: What are you going to make?
What are you going to make?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
A pot for making chanko, of course! I want to
make it so big it'll take at least two people to
hold!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: What?! I can't make a pot?!

text_block_list.name: Ceramics Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's not that you can't, but a pot would be a
little too advanced for a beginner to make.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hmm... That makes sense. I bet it would be tough to make something you're supposed to stick right over a fire...

text_block_list.name: Ceramics Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. Why don't you try making something
easier fir—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll have to do my very best, then! A clay
pot it is!

text_block_list.name: Ceramics Instructor
text_block_list.text: What?! You still want to make a pot?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yes, please! Oh, but I want to make a really big
one, so I don't mind if you charge me for the
materials and instruction.

text_block_list.name: Ceramics Instructor
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's of no matter to me, but... Hmm...
choice_data_list: Why don't you try after improving your skills?

text_block_list.name: Ceramics Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Experience... Indeed. And besides, it's delightful
simply having someone so enthusiastic about
ceramics attending the class...

text_block_list.name: Ceramics Instructor
text_block_list.text: Very well! Let's do what we can!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! Thank you so much! And thank you, too,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Ceramics Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Let's start with the design first. Go ahead and
sketch the sort of pot you wish to make.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay! Ehehe! Here I go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I want to make it reaaally big and smooth... This part should be like this, so it can hold a lot of ingredients, and then this part should be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The design Hishi Akebono comes up with is
beyond intricate and would probably be difficult
for even a professional to realize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a serious expression on her face, she revises
her draft multiple times and continues adjusting
her design. Then, finally...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Phew! There, I'm done! Here's the design for my
special, one-of-a-kind pot! What do you think,
sir?

text_block_list.name: Ceramics Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure about this? Don't get me
wrong—this is a wonderful design—but it looks
incredibly challenging to make...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best, sir!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps swept up by Hishi Akebono's contagious
enthusiasm, our instructor almost reflexively nods
in approval.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ultimately, although Hishi Akebono only gets as
far as finalizing her pot design today, she still
enjoys the entire process.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh... But I still want to make a pot for my first
ceramics piece! Nothing else will do.

text_block_list.name: Ceramics Instructor
text_block_list.text: Why do you want to make a pot so badly?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I just really love cooking! That's why I'm so
nitpicky about tableware.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I know a cooking pot isn't really "tableware" like
plates and stuff are, but a pot's still an important
tool for good food presentation!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And that's the reason I want to make my very own
pot!

text_block_list.name: Ceramics Instructor
text_block_list.text:
I see... That makes sense. Very well. Let's try to
make something good, then. Now, to do that, we
must start with the design!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yes, sir! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono begins studiously working on her
design for a perfect earthenware pot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ultimately, although she only gets as far as
finalizing her pot design, she still manages to
make something she's both satisfied with and
proud of.
